---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement to the project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What maintainer or learner problem would this solve?

## Proposed change

## Why it matters

## Evidence or examples

Link public examples or provide a small reproducible scenario. Do not include private repository content.

## Validation approach

How could the change be tested or reviewed?

## Checklist

- [ ] The proposal preserves the project's public, read-only discovery boundary.
- [ ] It does not require a paid service for the core workflow.
- [ ] I removed all secrets and personal information.
- [ ] I described configuration and documentation changes.
